name: SeerGuard: A Safety Framework for Mobile GUI Agents via World Model Prediction

description: arXiv:2607.15550v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mobile graphical user interface (GUI) agents have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in automating complex tasks, yet they introduce critical safety risks where a single erroneous action can lead to irreversible consequences. Existing safety mechanisms are primarily reactive, lacking the ability to assess risks before execution. In this paper, w...
author: Xue Yu, Bo Yuan, Pengshuai Yang, Kailin Zhao, Hong Hu, Junlan Feng
